display.purpose: Hero H1. Italic emphasis is always clay.

title.purpose: Resource card title, calculator input label.

body-article.purpose: Long-form prose — looser leading for read-through.

label.purpose: Nav, kickers, button labels, preset chips.

meta.purpose: Byline, footer, breakdown rows, category tags.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Primary button at rest — black hairline grounds, clay glow signals brand.

shadows.name: shadow-md
shadows.purpose: Hero-right panel, deck cards. Long soft clay drop.

shadows.name: shadow-result
shadows.value: 0 1px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--clay) 18%, transparent) inset, 0 24px 60px -32px color-mix(in srgb, var(--clay) 35%, transparent)
shadows.purpose: Calculator result panel — inner highlight plus falloff drop.

shadows.name: shadow-cta-hover
shadows.value: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--clay) 20%, transparent), 0 8px 32px -8px color-mix(in srgb, var(--clay) 20%, transparent)
shadows.purpose: CTA card lifts only on hover, never at rest.

motion.name: ease-default
motion.purpose: Default state transitions (hover, theme switch, nav). Ease-out-quint shape.

motion.name: ease-cta
motion.purpose: CTA card scale-on-hover — slightly snappier ease-out.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Pill CTA — clay fill, paper text, clay-tinted glow. Right-arrow translates on hover.
components.html: Book a call
components.css: .ds-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:14px 22px;font-family:"SF Pro Text",system-ui,sans-serif;font-weight:500;font-size:14.5px;letter-spacing:0.01em;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid transparent;transition:transform .2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1),background-color .25s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1),color .25s,border-color .25s,box-shadow .25s;cursor:pointer}.ds-btn .arrow{transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1)}.ds-btn:hover .arrow{transform:translateX(3px)}.ds-btn:active{transform:translateY(1px)}.ds-btn-primary{background:#E5B415;color:#0A0B0E;box-shadow:0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.55),0 2px 8px -2px rgba(229,180,21,0.22)}.ds-btn-primary:hover{background:#C4970A;color:#0A0B0E}

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent pill with rule border. Hover swaps border + text to clay.
components.html: Read article

components.name: Filter Chip Group
components.description: Segmented pill bar for resource filters. Active chip is ink fill, paper text.

components.name: Calculator Input
components.description: Composite input — paper-3 prefix/suffix chips bracket a transparent text input. Focus-within turns the wrap clay.

components.name: Preset Chip
components.description: Quick-select numeric preset under a calculator input. Active state is clay fill.

components.name: Result Panel
components.description: Calculator output — clay-tinted surface, serif Σ-prefixed label with extending rule, oversized tabular-num value.
components.html:
Marketing budget$125,000
RATE25% OF BUDGET
RECOUP UNITS @ $206,250
components.css: .ds-calc-result{position:relative;background:color-mix(in srgb,#E5B415 6%,#12141A);border:1px solid color-mix(in srgb,#E5B415 28%,#262A33);border-radius:14px;padding:32px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;box-shadow:0 1px 0 color-mix(in srgb,#E5B415 18%,transparent) inset,0 24px 60px -32px color-mix(in srgb,#E5B415 35%,transparent)}.ds-calc-result-label{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;font-family:"Bricolage Grotesque",system-ui,sans-serif;font-weight:500;font-size:clamp(24px,2.8vw,32px);font-variation-settings:"opsz" 36;letter-spacing:-0.02em;color:#ECEFF6;line-height:1.1}.ds-calc-result-label::before{content:"\03A3";font-family:"Bricolage Grotesque",serif;font-size:0.9em;color:#E5B415;font-style:italic;font-weight:400}.ds-calc-result-label::after{content:"";flex:1;height:1px;background:color-mix(in srgb,#E5B415 35%,transparent)}.ds-calc-result-value{font-family:"Bricolage Grotesque",system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(56px,10vw,104px);font-weight:600;color:#ECEFF6;letter-spacing:-0.045em;line-height:0.96;font-variation-settings:"opsz" 96;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;margin-top:4px}.ds-calc-result-breakdown{font-family:"Bebas Neue",Impact,sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:#8E95A4;line-height:1.9;margin-top:16px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid color-mix(in srgb,#E5B415 22%,#262A33);display:grid;gap:4px;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}.ds-calc-result-breakdown .ds-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px}.ds-calc-result-breakdown .ds-row span:first-child{color:#5C6272;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:11px}

components.name: TL;DR Card
components.description: Article summary block — paper-2 surface, clay pill label, dot-bulleted list with clay markers.
components.html:
TL;DR
  • The headline split number is not the deal.
  • Recoup terms set who actually earns first.
  • Net definitions hide most of the value.

components.name: CTA Card
components.description: Article-end CTA — paper-2 with radial clay wash, scales 1.025 on hover with clay-tinted gradient frame fade-in.
components.html:
Sharper read on your deal? Book a call.
Get in touch
components.css: .ds-cta-card{position:relative;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:32px;align-items:center;overflow:hidden;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #262A33;background:#12141A;padding:48px;text-decoration:none;color:inherit;transition:transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1),border-color 0.3s ease,box-shadow 0.3s ease}.ds-cta-card::before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 80% at 100% 50%,color-mix(in srgb,#E5B415 8%,transparent),transparent 70%);pointer-events:none}.ds-cta-card:hover{transform:scale(1.025);border-color:color-mix(in srgb,#E5B415 40%,transparent);box-shadow:0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb,#E5B415 20%,transparent),0 8px 32px -8px color-mix(in srgb,#E5B415 20%,transparent)}.ds-cta-card::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:-1px;border-radius:17px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,color-mix(in srgb,#E5B415 60%,transparent),transparent 40%,color-mix(in srgb,#E5B415 30%,transparent));opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s ease;pointer-events:none;z-index:0}.ds-cta-card:hover::after{opacity:1}.ds-cta-card-text,.ds-cta-card-action{position:relative;z-index:1}.ds-cta-card-headline{font-family:"Bricolage Grotesque",system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(20px,3vw,28px);font-weight:600;color:#ECEFF6;letter-spacing:-0.02em;line-height:1.2;font-variation-settings:"opsz" 32}.ds-cta-card-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:14px 22px;border-radius:999px;background:#E5B415;color:#0A0B0E;font-family:"SF Pro Text",system-ui,sans-serif;font-weight:500;font-size:14.5px;letter-spacing:0.01em}@media (max-width:640px){.ds-cta-card{grid-template-columns:1fr;padding:32px 24px;gap:24px}}

components.name: Resource Card (List Row)
components.description: Flat divided list row, not a tile. 48px boxed icon + body. Hover tints background 4% clay, title turns clay.
components.html:
What a publisher actually reads in your pitch deck

A publisher isn't evaluating only your game. They're building a risk model.

components.name: Primary Navigation
components.description: Sticky bar with backdrop-filter. Numbered Bebas links with clay `01`–`04` prefixes; Resources link is opted out, clay with arrow.
components.html:
spritzconsulting
01My Experience02Services03FAQ04ContactResources ↗
components.css: .ds-site-header{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:40;background:color-mix(in srgb,#0A0B0E 82%,transparent);backdrop-filter:saturate(140%) blur(14px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:saturate(140%) blur(14px);border-bottom:1px solid transparent}.ds-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:18px clamp(20px,4vw,56px);max-width:1280px;margin:0 auto;gap:18px}.ds-wordmark{display:inline-flex;align-items:baseline;gap:10px;font-family:"Bricolage Grotesque",system-ui,sans-serif;font-weight:500;font-size:20px;font-variation-settings:"opsz" 24;letter-spacing:-0.01em;color:#ECEFF6;text-decoration:none}.ds-dot{width:10px;height:10px;display:inline-block;transform:translateY(-1px);margin:0 4px;background:#E5B415;border-radius:50%;animation:ds-dot-pulse 1.8s ease-in-out infinite}@keyframes ds-dot-pulse{0%,100%{transform:translateY(-1px) scale(1);opacity:1;box-shadow:0 0 0 0 color-mix(in srgb,#E5B415 60%,transparent)}50%{transform:translateY(-1px) scale(1.18);opacity:0.7;box-shadow:0 0 0 6px color-mix(in srgb,#E5B415 0%,transparent)}}.ds-nav{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px}.ds-nav a{font-family:"Bebas Neue",Impact,sans-serif;font-size:14px;letter-spacing:0.04em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#8E95A4;padding:8px 14px;border-radius:999px;text-decoration:none;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;transition:color .25s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1),background-color .25s}.ds-nav a:hover{color:#ECEFF6}.ds-nav a.is-active{background:#E5B415;color:#0A0B0E}.ds-nav a .ds-num{color:#E5B415;margin-right:6px;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}.ds-nav a.is-active .ds-num{color:#0A0B0E}.ds-resources-link{color:#E5B415 !important;opacity:0.85;transition:opacity 0.2s}.ds-resources-link:hover{opacity:1}

narrative.overview: Voice of a producer who's also a typesetter. The site reads like a printed dossier — generous serif display, tabular monospace tickers, body in a system sans. Near-black surface lit from behind by a slow mustard aurora and a permanent 5% grain, signaling craft over template. The mustard (#E5B415) is the same hue as the founder's portrait backdrop, so the brand color is photographic in origin, not arbitrary. Density is editorial, not SaaS. Cards exist but are reserved for genuine containers; the resources list is a flat divided list, not a grid of icon-tiles. Magenta is present but rare — kicker accents in light theme, danger states only.
keyCharacteristics: Three families: Bricolage Grotesque display, SF Pro body, Bebas Neue mono/label uppercase
Pill radius 999px for interactive; 8–18px for panels; 4px focus
Magenta promoted to kicker accents in light theme only

rules.name: The One Mustard Rule
rules.body: Clay is the only chromatic accent on any screen unless the role is semantic (danger = magenta, success = green). If something needs to pop but isn't a CTA, the answer is weight or scale, not a second color.

rules.name: The Photographic-Origin Rule
rules.body: --portrait-bg: #E5B415 is theme-invariant. The brand color is locked to the portrait's actual backdrop. Don't theme-shift it for variety.

rules.name: The Tinted-Black Rule
rules.body: Never #000, never #fff. Paper is always tilted toward the brand hue.

rules.name: The Italic-Means-Clay Rule
rules.body: Italic text is always clay. Never an italic in default ink.

rules.name: The Counter-Header Rule
rules.body: Article H2 carries a ::before numeral counter (decimal-leading-zero) in clay Bebas above the heading. The number is the marker, the heading is the content.

rules.name: The Op-Size Rule
rules.body: Bricolage uses font-variation-settings 'opsz' N matched to the rendered size. Don't render a 100px headline at opsz 24.

rules.name: The Mono-For-Numbers Rule
rules.body: Any numeric value rendered in chrome uses font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Cards, inputs, list items, filter chips are flat at rest. Shadows respond to state — never decorative.

rules.name: The Clay-Tinted-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every shadow that exists is tinted with the brand mustard at low alpha. No neutral grey shadows.

rules.name: The Ambient-Atmosphere Rule
rules.body: Grain and aurora are always-on but barely-on. They produce a printed-and-photographed-slightly-out-of-focus feel without crossing into theme.

dos: Do tint every neutral toward the brand hue. Paper #0A0B0E not #000; cream #F4F3ED not #fff.
Do keep clay (#E5B415) as the single chromatic accent. If light theme, deepen to #8A6600 for legibility.
Do use Bricolage Grotesque for display and set font-variation-settings 'opsz' N matched to render size.
Do use Bebas Neue uppercase for labels, kickers, nav, and meta — never for body.
Do use the ::before counter pattern (decimal-leading-zero in clay Bebas) for article H2 chapter marks.
Do apply font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums to every chrome number.
Do italicize the emphasized phrase in headlines in clay (<em>).
Do keep CTA cards, TL;DR cards, and result cards at radius 14–18px; pills at 999px; inputs at 8px.
Do clamp display sizes and section padding with clamp().
Do keep grain + aurora running but barely visible. Pause on prefers-reduced-motion and tab-hidden.
Do tint shadows with clay at low alpha; black hairline grounds, clay glow signals brand.
Do apply cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) as the default ease.
donts: Don't introduce a second decorative accent. Magenta is danger and light-theme kicker only; green is success only.
Don't add gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient).
Don't use glassmorphism beyond the existing sticky header backdrop-filter.
Don't add side-stripe borders (border-left: 3px solid clay) on callouts.
Don't wrap the resource list in icon-tile cards. The flat divided list is intentional.
Don't use neutral grey shadows. Every shadow tints toward clay.
Don't render Bricolage at the wrong opsz.
Don't use em dashes in UI copy or articles — commas, colons, parens instead.
Don't let scroll-wheel change number-input values on calculators.
Don't ship animations that ignore prefers-reduced-motion.
